---
title: "DESeq2_Analysis"
output: html_document
---

This markdown file will complete a DESeq2 Analysis for both cell types. It assumes that there are 2 csv files that have been made with information written as the following:

`sample,condition,replicate`

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
```


##### cCD1 #####

```{r}
# Read data
cDC1_counts <- read_tsv("GSE266583_cDC1_Raw_counts.tsv")
cDC1_coldata <- read.csv("csv_data/cDC1_coldata.csv", row.names = 1)
```


```{r}
# Prepare count matrix
cDC1_count_matrix <- as.matrix(cDC1_counts[, -1])
rownames(cDC1_count_matrix) <- cDC1_counts$gene_id
cDC1_count_matrix <- round(cDC1_count_matrix)

# Ensure order matches
cDC1_count_matrix <- cDC1_count_matrix[, rownames(cDC1_coldata)]

# Verify
all(colnames(cDC1_count_matrix) == rownames(cDC1_coldata))  # Should be TRUE
```

```{r}
# Create DESeq2 object
dds_1 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = cDC1_count_matrix,
  colData = cDC1_coldata,
  design = ~ condition
)

# Filter low counts
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds_1) >= 10) >= 2
dds_1 <- dds_1[keep, ]

# Run DESeq2
dds_1 <- DESeq(dds_1)

```


```{r}
# Get results (KO vs WT)
results_cDC1 <- results(dds_1, contrast = c("condition", "KO", "WT"))

resOrdered_cDC1 <- results_cDC1[order(results_cDC1$padj),]
deseq2_res_cDC1 <- as_tibble(resOrdered_cDC1, rownames='gene')
deseq2_res_cDC1

summary(results_cDC1)
```

```{r}
#Annotate which genes are up regulated, down regulated, or non-significant

sig_cDC1 <- deseq2_res_cDC1 %>% relocate(gene)
sig_cDC1$significant <- "No"  # default: not significant
sig_cDC1$significant[deseq2_res_cDC1$padj < 0.05] <- "Yes"
# Direction = based on padj < 0.05 only (no fold-change filter)
sig_cDC1$direction <- "NotSig"
sig_cDC1$direction[deseq2_res_cDC1$padj < 0.05 & deseq2_res_cDC1$log2FoldChange > 0] <- "Up"
sig_cDC1$direction[deseq2_res_cDC1$padj < 0.05 & deseq2_res_cDC1$log2FoldChange < 0] <- "Down"

sig_cDC1
```


```{r}

# saving and viewing results 

cat("\n=== cDC1 Differential Expression Results ===\n")
cat("Total significant genes (FDR < 0.05):", sum(sig_cDC1$significant == "Yes"), "\n")
cat("Upregulated in KO:", sum(sig_cDC1$direction == "Up"), "\n")
cat("Downregulated in KO:", sum(sig_cDC1$direction == "Down"), "\n")

write.csv(sig_cDC1, "cDC1_DESeq2_significant.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```











##### cCD2 #####
```{r}
# Read data
cDC2_counts <- read_tsv("GSE266583_cDC2_Raw_counts.tsv")
cDC2_coldata <- read.csv("csv_data/cDC2_coldata.csv", row.names = 1)
```

```{r}
# Prepare count matrix
cDC2_count_matrix <- as.matrix(cDC2_counts[, -1])
rownames(cDC2_count_matrix) <- cDC2_counts$gene_id
cDC2_count_matrix <- round(cDC2_count_matrix)
```

```{r}
# Ensure order matches
cDC2_count_matrix <- cDC2_count_matrix[, rownames(cDC2_coldata)]

# Verify
all(colnames(cDC2_count_matrix) == rownames(cDC2_coldata))  # Should be TRUE
```

```{r}
# Create DESeq2 object
dds_2 <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = cDC2_count_matrix,
  colData = cDC2_coldata,
  design = ~ condition
)

# Filter low counts
keep <- rowSums(counts(dds_2) >= 10) >= 2
dds_2 <- dds_2[keep, ]

# Run DESeq2
dds_2 <- DESeq(dds_2)

```

```{r}
# Get results (KO vs WT)
results_cDC2 <- results(dds_2, contrast = c("condition", "KO", "WT"))

resOrdered_cDC2 <- results_cDC2[order(results_cDC2$padj),]
deseq2_res_cDC2 <- as_tibble(resOrdered_cDC2, rownames='gene')
deseq2_res_cDC2

summary(results_cDC2)
```
```{r}
#Annotate which genes are up regulated, down regulated, or non-significant

sig_cDC2 <- deseq2_res_cDC2 %>% relocate(gene)
sig_cDC2$significant <- "No"  # default: not significant
sig_cDC2$significant[deseq2_res_cDC2$padj < 0.05] <- "Yes"
# Direction = based on padj < 0.05 only (no fold-change filter)
sig_cDC2$direction <- "NotSig"
sig_cDC2$direction[deseq2_res_cDC2$padj < 0.05 & deseq2_res_cDC2$log2FoldChange > 0] <- "Up"
sig_cDC2$direction[deseq2_res_cDC2$padj < 0.05 & deseq2_res_cDC2$log2FoldChange < 0] <- "Down"

sig_cDC2
```

```{r}

# saving and viewing results 

cat("\n=== cDC2 Differential Expression Results ===\n")
cat("Total significant genes (FDR < 0.05):", sum(sig_cDC2$significant == "Yes"), "\n")
cat("Upregulated in KO:", sum(sig_cDC2$direction == "Up"), "\n")
cat("Downregulated in KO:", sum(sig_cDC2$direction == "Down"), "\n")

write.csv(sig_cDC2, "cDC2_DESeq2_significant.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
